Multichain Airdrop SWAN

Swan Chain is an Ethereum layer 2 AI computing blockchain built on OP Stack, helping Web3 and AI projects to integrate storage, computing, CDN, and payment into one suite.

Claim Now
Unlock The Next Level of Ethereum with
Swan Orchestrator
The most advanced blockchain scaling & computing technology

AI Container

Build, deploy, and scale AI models effortlessly on the blockchain.

Auction Engine

Secure the computing resources you need at the best price-guaranteed.

Edge Data Center

Process data at the edge for real-time responsiveness and global reach.

Smart Contract Payment

Streamline payments and automate tasks with secure, trustless contracts.

See The Differences You Can Make
With Swan Chain

Power AI Revolution with Decentralized Computing

Supercharge your dApps with Swan Chain's unmatched decentralized computing network. Handle even the most demanding applications with ease.

Build Lightning-Fast dApps Without Limits

Save 90% on gas fees compared to Ethereum and deploy your dream dApps in record time. Forget the development delays and focus on building killer user experiences.

Transform Vision to Reality with Swan's Ultimate Toolkit

Swan Chain's toolkit equips you for every stage of your dApp journey. Effortless data storage with Multi-Chain Storage, advanced code management with Lagrange, and powerful RPC services.

See What's Possible with Swan Chain

Decentralized Computing

Tap into Swan's vast decentralized computing network with 150+ computing providers in 17+ cities.

Decentralized Storage

Protect your digital assets with Swan's storage solutions, combining Filecoin, IPFS, and cutting-edge technologies.

Decentralized Payments

Send and receive money in any currency, to anyone, anywhere, with instant transactions and minimal fees.

Decentralized Applications

Bring your vision to life with Swan's dApp success kit, offering design, development, and deployment support.

Empower Your dApps with Swan Chain

Dream, code and launch dApps on Swan Chain, the layer 2 AI computing blockchain for effortlessly building and scaling your dApps to infinity. Ditch development roadblocks, crush fees, and unleash your app's true potential.
